contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)
- Amount: 0
- Description: Governor column, GAS authorization, SCHEMA, and Edgar wiring (2026-04)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1027
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/234
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/235
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/36
  
  Details:
  ## What changed (governor + downstream authorization)
  
  - **Edgar / Rails (`sentiment_importer`):** Main Ledger tab **`Governors`** drives Telegram Chat Logs **column S (`Governor`)** (YES/NO). Telegram raw log append widened to **A–S** so S is populated. Governor resolution matches the **active contributor** name against the sheet.
  - **`tokenomics` schema (`SCHEMA.md`):** Documented **Governor** on Telegram Chat Logs; **Inventory Movement** column **N (`STATUS`)** — `NEW` vs `unauthorized` when the signer is not the warehouse manager (from **`- Manager Name:`**) and **Governor ≠ YES**; **Scored Expense Submissions** column **N (`Processing Status`)** — `authorized` vs `unauthorized` using **Reporter** vs **DAO Member** plus **Governor**; legacy rows without N treated as authorized in expense insert path.
  - **Google Apps Script — inventory movement (`process_movement_telegram_logs.gs`):** Reads **A–S**; sets **N** to **`NEW`** or **`unauthorized`** per policy; Phase 2 only posts ledgers for **`NEW`** (already the case; non-NEW skipped).
  - **Google Apps Script — scored expenses (`tdg_expenses_processing.gs`):** Sets **N** to **`authorized`** / **`unauthorized`**; **does not** call **`InsertExpenseRecords`** when **`unauthorized`** (row still appended for audit); guard for legacy rows missing **N**.
  
  ## Pull requests (GitHub evidence)
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1027
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/234
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/235
  
  ## Convention follow-up (this submission)
  
  - **`agentic_ai_context`:** **`DAO_CLIENT_AI_AGENT_CONTRIBUTIONS.md`** documents mandatory TrueSightDAO PR URLs and explicit bodies for AI-enabled **`[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]`** submissions via **`dao_client`**. README, **`PROJECT_INDEX.md`**, **`WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md`**, and **`CONTEXT_UPDATES.md`** updated to point agents at that flow. PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/36
  - **`dao_client`:** added **`modules/report_ai_agent_contribution.py`** and README pointers to the convention doc; merged to **`main`** as https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/commit/252e523 (no separate PR; direct push to **`main`**).
  
  ## Apps Script mirrors (operator redeploy if needed)
  
  - Movement: script id **`1wONDeDwZ_fXNapDKpstWrBION3aV3r7NXwq7PCdqbW1LvI5ceaykQNbR`** (Web App **Deploy → New version** after **`clasp push`**).
  - Expenses: script id **`19Wag9x-sjbLVgIsPh2vj90ZG7Rgq2iGaVOomAeAvtg6CdZKJHLZ9AJrC`**.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
